content.query:
SELECT
cst.[CustomerID]
,trim(SUBSTRING(cst.[Address1],0,CHARINDEX(' ',cst.[Address1]))) as StreetNumber
,trim(SUBSTRING(cst.[Address1],CHARINDEX(' ',cst.[Address1]),1000)) as StreetName
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,brn.LongName as [Market]
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Baths_Composite_Ranking_Index]
,zonda.[Windows_Composite_Ranking_Index]
 FROM 
 [EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[DIM_BRANCH] brn
 ,[EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[ODS].[MKTDATA_ZONDA_ZIP_CODE_INDEX] zonda
 where 
 cst.CustomerID = lds.CustomerID
 and cst.[Zip] = zonda.[ZipCode]
 and lds.BranchID = brn.BranchID
 and lds.Sold = 'True'
 and cst.OperatingCompany = 'MAC'
 and lds.EntryDate > '2022-01-01' 
order BY
CAST(zonda.[Overall_Remodeling_Composite_Ranking_Index] as DECIMAL(10,2)) desc
